search_document:
User Request: Orders by employee.

Dashboard Components:
Title: Orders by Employee
Type: chart
Description: Total orders processed by each employee
Title: Employee Performance
Type: table
Description: List of employees with their total orders and revenue generated
Title: Total Orders
Type: kpi
Description: Overall number of orders processed

sql_queries.title: Orders by Employee
sql_queries.description: Total orders processed by each employee
sql_queries.sql: SELECT e.EmployeeID, e.FirstName || ' ' || e.LastName AS EmployeeName, COUNT(o.OrderID) AS TotalOrders FROM Employees e LEFT JOIN Orders o ON e.EmployeeID = o.EmployeeID GROUP BY e.EmployeeID, EmployeeName ORDER BY TotalOrders DESC

sql_queries.title: Employee Performance
sql_queries.description: List of employees with their total orders and revenue generated
sql_queries.sql: SELECT e.EmployeeID, e.FirstName || ' ' || e.LastName AS EmployeeName, COUNT(o.OrderID) AS TotalOrders, SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS TotalRevenue FROM Employees e LEFT JOIN Orders o ON e.EmployeeID = o.EmployeeID LEFT JOIN "Order Details" od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID GROUP BY e.EmployeeID, EmployeeName ORDER BY TotalRevenue DESC

sql_queries.title: Total Orders
sql_queries.sql: SELECT COUNT(OrderID) AS TotalOrders FROM Orders
